texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome to Pearl Mara, an exclusive luxury tented lodge, nestled on the wild hills of the Maasai Mara. From this elevated sanctuary, you'll witness the  majestic  Mara  Triangle  and  the  awe-inspiring  annual  wildebeest migration-one of the world's natural wonders.
texts.text: Welcome to Pearl Mara, an exclusive luxury tented lodge, nestled on the wild hills of the Maasai Mara. From this elevated sanctuary, you'll witness the  majestic  Mara  Triangle  and  the  awe-inspiring  annual  wildebeest migration-one of the world's natural wonders.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Set  in  perfect  harmony  with  nature,  our  camp  is  designed  to  blend seamlessly into the wilderness, creating a sense of complete privacy and tranquility. At Pearl Mara we offer a unique blend of luxury and adventure, immersing you in the wild alongside the utmost comfort.
texts.text: Set  in  perfect  harmony  with  nature,  our  camp  is  designed  to  blend seamlessly into the wilderness, creating a sense of complete privacy and tranquility. At Pearl Mara we offer a unique blend of luxury and adventure, immersing you in the wild alongside the utmost comfort.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Your  stay  here  goes  beyond  indulgence;  it's  an  essential  contribution to the protection of the Maasai Mara for generations to come. texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestled high above the Maasai Mara, you will encounter a wildness that compels you to pause a while.
texts.text: Nestled high above the Maasai Mara, you will encounter a wildness that compels you to pause a while.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Experience  unparalleled  luxury  at  Pearl  Mara  Tented  Lodge,  where six  exclusive  suites  offer  supreme  comfort  and  elegance.  Each  suite, surrounded by a private garden, presents breathtaking vistas of the Mara, ensuring ultimate seclusion and tranquility.
texts.text: Experience  unparalleled  luxury  at  Pearl  Mara  Tented  Lodge,  where six  exclusive  suites  offer  supreme  comfort  and  elegance.  Each  suite, surrounded by a private garden, presents breathtaking vistas of the Mara, ensuring ultimate seclusion and tranquility.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We believe  in  making  a  positive  impact  on  the  land  we  call  home.  By partnering with local  communities we can understand what they need and what the land around us needs through supporting vital education, healthcare, and conservation projects, fostering a sustainable future for the Maasai Mara and its people.
texts.text: We believe  in  making  a  positive  impact  on  the  land  we  call  home.  By partnering with local  communities we can understand what they need and what the land around us needs through supporting vital education, healthcare, and conservation projects, fostering a sustainable future for the Maasai Mara and its people.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Your wellbeing is at the heart of Pearl Mara. Which is why all our beverages are  alcohol-free.  From  our  signature  'Taste  of  the  Wild'  to  a  morning Espresso Martini, sit back and enjoy the wilderness of the Mara.
texts.text: Your wellbeing is at the heart of Pearl Mara. Which is why all our beverages are  alcohol-free.  From  our  signature  'Taste  of  the  Wild'  to  a  morning Espresso Martini, sit back and enjoy the wilderness of the Mara.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are dedicated to preserving the pristine beauty of our surroundings. Our  eco-friendly  practices  are  designed  to  protect  and  enhance  the natural landscape while providing a unique and immersive experience for our guests. We utilise cutting-edge solar panels to capture and convert sunlight into clean, renewable energy. This solar power system ensures that all our operations, from lighting to heating, are powered by a sustainable source. This means we are almost entirely operating off-the-grid, using advanced technology to generate and manage our own energy.
texts.text: We are dedicated to preserving the pristine beauty of our surroundings. Our  eco-friendly  practices  are  designed  to  protect  and  enhance  the natural landscape while providing a unique and immersive experience for our guests. We utilise cutting-edge solar panels to capture and convert sunlight into clean, renewable energy. This solar power system ensures that all our operations, from lighting to heating, are powered by a sustainable source. This means we are almost entirely operating off-the-grid, using advanced technology to generate and manage our own energy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: One  of  the  cornerstones  of  our  sustainability  efforts  is  our  very  own greenhouse, managed with care by our in-house Shamba (farm). This not only supports our commitment to fresh, locally grown produce but also enhances your experience with farm-to-table offerings. Our greenhouse employs sustainable farming practices to grow a variety of fresh, organic vegetables, herbs, and fruits. We use natural fertilisers and pest control methods to ensure that our produce is as wholesome and eco-friendly as possible.
texts.text: One  of  the  cornerstones  of  our  sustainability  efforts  is  our  very  own greenhouse, managed with care by our in-house Shamba (farm). This not only supports our commitment to fresh, locally grown produce but also enhances your experience with farm-to-table offerings. Our greenhouse employs sustainable farming practices to grow a variety of fresh, organic vegetables, herbs, and fruits. We use natural fertilisers and pest control methods to ensure that our produce is as wholesome and eco-friendly as possible.

texts.orig: Where time slows down... ...and pauses for conscious connection with our land.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We believe a safari experience is much more than just the game drive. It's watching the morning sunrise over the hill, it's spending time with loved ones, away from the bustle of every day life, it's time slowing down while you listen to the chatter of the birds.
texts.text: We believe a safari experience is much more than just the game drive. It's watching the morning sunrise over the hill, it's spending time with loved ones, away from the bustle of every day life, it's time slowing down while you listen to the chatter of the birds.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Pearl Mara we care about your wellness experience. It's at the heart of everything we do.
texts.text: At Pearl Mara we care about your wellness experience. It's at the heart of everything we do.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 6 private, spacious & luxurious en-suite tents featuring a king size bed, outdoor deck with Hot tub / Plunge Pool. In-room Dining and Massage services available.
texts.text: 6 private, spacious & luxurious en-suite tents featuring a king size bed, outdoor deck with Hot tub / Plunge Pool. In-room Dining and Massage services available.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: - Deluxe King and Twin Suite - King Suite have a King-sized bed, while Twin Suite have 2 queen-sized beds.
texts.text: Deluxe King and Twin Suite - King Suite have a King-sized bed, while Twin Suite have 2 queen-sized beds.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -.Honeymoon Suite - A larger King Suite with Hot tub / Plunge Pool on the extended deck.
texts.text: -.Honeymoon Suite - A larger King Suite with Hot tub / Plunge Pool on the extended deck.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: -.Family Suite - A King and Twin Suite interconnecting with extended deck.
texts.text: -.Family Suite - A King and Twin Suite interconnecting with extended deck.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: However you choose to explore the Maasai Mara, make Pearl Mara the heart of your journey.
texts.text: However you choose to explore the Maasai Mara, make Pearl Mara the heart of your journey.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our six exclusive suites offer an intimate retreat, designed with the utmost  care  to  provide  unparalleled  comfort.  Surrounded  by  lush gardens  and  offering  breathtaking  views  of  the  Mara,  each  suite promises tranquility, privacy, and indulgence.
texts.text: Our six exclusive suites offer an intimate retreat, designed with the utmost  care  to  provide  unparalleled  comfort.  Surrounded  by  lush gardens  and  offering  breathtaking  views  of  the  Mara,  each  suite promises tranquility, privacy, and indulgence.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Revel in a curated selection of activities that blend relaxation and adventure.
texts.text: Revel in a curated selection of activities that blend relaxation and adventure.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Games Pavilion: Pool, table tennis, foosball, darts, and board games.
texts.text: Games Pavilion: Pool, table tennis, foosball, darts, and board games.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Explore the Mara with activities tailored to your unique desires.
texts.text: Explore the Mara with activities tailored to your unique desires.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An exhilarating way to explore the Maasai Mara's stunning landscapes. Ride through scenic trails, getting up close to wildlife and experiencing the beauty of the savannah in an active and adventurous way.
texts.text: An exhilarating way to explore the Maasai Mara's stunning landscapes. Ride through scenic trails, getting up close to wildlife and experiencing the beauty of the savannah in an active and adventurous way.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Explore the rich avian diversity of the Mara with expert guides. Spot vibrant species in their natural habitat and discover the region's breathtaking birdlife like never before
texts.text: Explore the rich avian diversity of the Mara with expert guides. Spot vibrant species in their natural habitat and discover the region's breathtaking birdlife like never before

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Experience the Maasai Mara like never before with a horseback safari, where you can ride through the vast savannah, getting up close to wildlife in a truly unique and immersive way. Feel the thrill of the open plains.
texts.text: Experience the Maasai Mara like never before with a horseback safari, where you can ride through the vast savannah, getting up close to wildlife in a truly unique and immersive way. Feel the thrill of the open plains.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unwind with an indulgent in-room treatment at Pearl Mara, where expert therapists bring relaxation directly to your luxurious tent. Enjoy a range of soothing treatments, from massages to spa therapies, all designe to rejuvenate your body and mind. Experience ultimate tranquility in the privacy of your own space, surrounded by the serene beauty of the Maasai Mara.
texts.text: Unwind with an indulgent in-room treatment at Pearl Mara, where expert therapists bring relaxation directly to your luxurious tent. Enjoy a range of soothing treatments, from massages to spa therapies, all designe to rejuvenate your body and mind. Experience ultimate tranquility in the privacy of your own space, surrounded by the serene beauty of the Maasai Mara.

texts.orig: Walk with Rhinos: A Rare Encounter

texts.orig: Get up close to majestic rhinos on a guided walking safari. Experience the thrill of observing these gentle giants in their natural habitat, led by expert guides ensuring your safety and an unforgettable adventure

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Unwind as the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in golden hues. Enjoy signature drinks and light bites in the heart of the wilderness-a perfect end to a day of adventure.
texts.text: Unwind as the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in golden hues. Enjoy signature drinks and light bites in the heart of the wilderness-a perfect end to a day of adventure.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Discover the magic of the Kenyan wilderness on a walking safari at Pearl Mara. Guided by skilled trackers, immerse yourself in the sights, sounds, and scents of the savannah. Encounter wildlife up close, learn about the ecosystem's hidden wonders, and experience nature like never before. It's a journey of discovery and connection you won't forget.
texts.text: Discover the magic of the Kenyan wilderness on a walking safari at Pearl Mara. Guided by skilled trackers, immerse yourself in the sights, sounds, and scents of the savannah. Encounter wildlife up close, learn about the ecosystem's hidden wonders, and experience nature like never before. It's a journey of discovery and connection you won't forget.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: By securing a reservation at Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge, you hereby consent to the terms and conditions stipulated herein.
texts.text: By securing a reservation at Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge, you hereby consent to the terms and conditions stipulated herein.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To  initiate  a  new  booking,  kindly  direct  your  request  to  reservations@pearlmara.com.  Upon receiving  your  inquiry,  your  reservation  will  be  provisionally  held  for  a  period  of  5  working reservation summary. Extensions may be granted for up to two additional periods upon request.
texts.text: To  initiate  a  new  booking,  kindly  direct  your  request  to  reservations@pearlmara.com.  Upon receiving  your  inquiry,  your  reservation  will  be  provisionally  held  for  a  period  of  5  working reservation summary. Extensions may be granted for up to two additional periods upon request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is recomended for all guests of Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge to possess comprehensive travel and medical insurance. This should cover potential cancellations, medical expenses, loss or damage of personal belongings, and money. Additionally, we recomend guests to secure AMRE Flying Doctors coverage for emergency evacuations.

This should cover potential cancellations, medical expenses, loss or damage of personal belongings, and money. Additionally, we recomend guests to secure AMRE Flying Doctors coverage for emergency evacuations.
